subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye at all times be engaged in the remembrance of the All-Merciful, and be protected from the evil of the followers of religions who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در کل احیان بذکر رحمن مشغول باشید و از شر اهل ادیان من الذین
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
